mapper.select:
select id, supplier_name, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, address, remark, created_at, updated_at from supplier_info where project_id = #{projectId} and is_deleted = 0
and ( supplier_name like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') or contact_name like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') or contact_phone like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') or contact_email like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )
order by updated_at desc, created_at desc
select id, supplier_name, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, address, remark, created_at, updated_at from supplier_info where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select id, project_id, supplier_name, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, address, remark, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from supplier_info where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update supplier_info set supplier_name = #{supplierName}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, contact_email = #{contactEmail}, address = #{address}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select p.id, p.supplier_id, s.supplier_name, p.cost_plan_id, cp.item_name as cost_plan_name, p.item_name, p.quantity, p.unit_price, p.total_amount, p.status, p.expected_delivery_date, p.actual_delivery_date, p.created_at, p.updated_at from procurement_item p left join supplier_info s on s.id = p.supplier_id and s.is_deleted = 0 left join cost_plan cp on cp.id = p.cost_plan_id and cp.is_deleted = 0 where p.project_id = #{projectId} and p.id = #{id} and p.is_deleted = 0

select id, project_id, supplier_id, cost_plan_id, item_name, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, status, expected_delivery_date, actual_delivery_date, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from procurement_item where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update procurement_item set supplier_id = #{supplierId}, cost_plan_id = #{costPlanId}, item_name = #{itemName}, quantity = #{quantity}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, status = #{status}, expected_delivery_date = #{expectedDeliveryDate}, actual_delivery_date = #{actualDeliveryDate}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select c.id, c.supplier_id, s.supplier_name, c.contract_no, c.contract_name, c.contract_type, c.sign_date, c.total_amount, c.deliverables, c.payment_terms, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at from contract_info c left join supplier_info s on s.id = c.supplier_id and s.is_deleted = 0 where c.project_id = #{projectId} and c.id = #{id} and c.is_deleted = 0

select id, project_id, supplier_id, contract_no, contract_name, contract_type, sign_date, total_amount, deliverables, payment_terms, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from contract_info where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update contract_info set supplier_id = #{supplierId}, contract_no = #{contractNo}, contract_name = #{contractName}, contract_type = #{contractType}, sign_date = #{signDate}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, deliverables = #{deliverables}, payment_terms = #{paymentTerms}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
